Seaborne:Keywords:Cast:Name: Cast
Seaborne:Keywords:Cast:Description: Hooks the newest card in your discard pile. Each stack hooks one card deeper.
Seaborne:Keywords:Reel:Name: Reel
Seaborne:Keywords:Reel:Description: Pull cards into your hand starting at the hooked card and moving toward the newest discarded card. Removes all Cast.
Seaborne:Keywords:Wet:Name: Wet
Seaborne:Keywords:Wet:Description: Triggers effects when reeled. Does not count as playing the card.
Seaborne:Keywords:Imbued:Name: Imbued
Seaborne:Keywords:Imbued:Description: This card gains double effect when a modifier is applied to it.
Seaborne:Keywords:Unimbued:Name: Unimbued
Seaborne:Keywords:Waterwall:Name: Waterwall
Seaborne:Keywords:Waterwall:Description: Blocks attack damage only if the damage is less than or equal to its stacks. Removed at end of turn.
Seaborne:Keywords:Trance:Name: Trance
Seaborne:Keywords:Trance:Description: Enemies with Trance use their intent but cannot complete their turn or advance normally.
Seaborne:Keywords:Cannon:Name: Cannon
Seaborne:Keywords:Cannon:Description: Loaded cannonballs fire through cannon-firing cards. Firing does not count as playing the cannonball.
Seaborne:Keywords:Gems:Name: Gems
Seaborne:Keywords:Gems:Description: Recharge each turn and modify the first eligible card for each gem.
